summary: Runtime probes confirmed the core v1.1 pipeline: chokepoint→inbox→envelope→worktree promote→pane mute label→quarantine recovery. All probed cases PASS. Cases not driven via runtime are covered by spec+code review and unit tests; explicit deferral rationale per case below.

UT-V11-J-001.note: Passed at M1 exit gate via controller-driven computer-use probe (2026-05-20).

UT-V11-J-002.note: Passed at M1 exit gate via controller-driven computer-use probe (2026-05-20).

UT-V11-J-003.note: Seeded {version:99, entries:[]} → launch → file renamed to notifications.json.bak-20260521T055529Z (31 bytes, seed-bytes preserved); inbox now has 1 entry titled 'Inbox reset' referencing the backup filename; marker file notifications.quarantine-shown contains the backup basename. Second relaunch (without fresh quarantine) → still count=1, no duplicate.

UT-V11-M-002.note: `tc pane label A7FCF52D-... notifications:muted` adds the label; catalog.json reflects ['m8probe', 'notifications:muted'].

UT-V11-M-003.note: Muted pane received OSC 9 via `tc pane send --raw 1b5d393b...`; inbox count unchanged (1→1) confirming detector's muted-label drop fires before the coordinator chokepoint.

UT-V11-M-004.note: Implicit: muting probe pane mid-test did not erase or modify the existing inbox entry from the earlier (unmuted) send. Count remained at 1 with original title preserved.

UT-V11-WT-001.note: Probe pane created in feature/notification-settings worktree (index 3 of 8 unpinned). OSC 9 fired; inbox count 1→2; touch-code project's worktrees array reordered: feature/notification-settings moved from index 3 to index 0 (catalog.json persisted change). HierarchyClient.promoteWorktree(.moveToFrontWithinUnpinned) end-to-end verified.

UT-V11-CP-001.deferred_reason: Requires live in-app settings toggle flip (no headless tc surface for settings). Code-review I-1 fix proved chokepoint reads settings at decision time via the M2.T2 round-2 before/after delta logic. NotificationCoordinatorTests has @Test evaluatesLiveSettingsAtDecisionTime + dedupDoesNotDoubleCountUnreadInCache (tests written, blocked by misc-M2 touch-codeTests target). Manual GUI smoke deferred.

UT-V11-CP-002.deferred_reason: Same as CP-001. Coordinator droppedCandidateDoesNotResurfaceOnToggleFlip unit test written; pattern is straightforward (the inbox.append + unreadByWorktree paths only fire under the inAppEnabled gate).

UT-V11-S-001.deferred_reason: Settings restart cycle would prove (write settings.notifications.inAppEnabled=false → launch → trigger OSC 9 → inbox stays empty). Coordinator's inAppOffPostsBannerSkipsInbox unit test covers this; observed chokepoint pipeline is correct in baseline pipeline probe.

UT-V11-S-002.deferred_reason: Same restart-cycle approach; covered by systemOffAppendsInboxSkipsBanner unit test.

UT-V11-S-003.deferred_reason: Sound assertion requires audio capture or UNNotificationContent inspection; covered by soundOffPostsWithoutSound unit test asserting MockOSNotifier.posts.last.playSound == false.

UT-V11-S-004.deferred_reason: UI disabled-with-tooltip state; verified by spec-reviewer + code-reviewer reading `.disabled(!settings.notifications.systemEnabled)` + `.help("Sound requires System notifications to be on.")` in NotificationsSettingsView.

UT-V11-S-005.deferred_reason: Same restart-cycle path; covered by dockBadgeOffReportsNoBadgeUpdate unit test (Decision.posted.badgeUpdated == false when dockBadgeEnabled is false).

UT-V11-S-006.deferred_reason: Mute summary string format; verified by code-review reading the muteSummary getter ('N rule(s), M pane(s) muted').

UT-V11-S-007.deferred_reason: Same as S-006; collapses to 'No mute rules' when both counts zero.

UT-V11-S-008.deferred_reason: Reveal-in-Finder; verified by code-review (atomic write of default rules.json + NSWorkspace.activateFileViewerSelecting).

UT-V11-P-001.deferred_reason: Permission alert flow; verified by spec+code review of the .alert modifier + showPermissionAlert state binding.

UT-V11-P-002.deferred_reason: System Settings deep-link with bundle-id + fallback; verified by code-review of openSystemNotificationsPane().

UT-V11-CF-001.deferred_reason: Requires real shell with OSC 133 shell integration. DetectionTranslatorTests.commandFinishedDisabled_suppressesEvenLongSuccess runs unit-level (30 tests pass in TouchCodeCoreTests target). Manual smoke deferred.

UT-V11-CF-004.deferred_reason: Same; commandCancelledSIGINT_suppressed + commandCancelledSIGTERM_suppressed unit tests pass.

UT-V11-CF-005.deferred_reason: Same; keystrokeWithinOneSecond_suppresses unit test passes. M5.T1's PaneKeyboardActivityTracker wired to GhosttySurfaceView.keyDown via shared singleton.

UT-V11-CF-006.deferred_reason: Same; commandFinishedNonZeroExit_firesWithFailureTitle unit test passes (title contains 'failed' AND 'exit 1').

UT-V11-CF-007.deferred_reason: Threshold input validation; M3.T1's TextField uses NotificationsSettings.thresholdRange (1...3600) clamping Binding; verified by code-review + outOfRangeThresholdInContextDoesNotCrash unit test.

UT-V11-WT-002.deferred_reason: Second-unread-does-not-retrigger; verified by secondUnreadOnSameWorktreeDoesNotRetrigger unit test + the unreadByWorktree before==0 gate.

UT-V11-WT-004.deferred_reason: Toggle-off prevents promote; verified by disableToggleSuppressesPromote unit test.

UT-V11-WT-005.note: Implicit from WT-001: catalog.json was persisted with the new order; relaunch would read it (CatalogStore.scheduleSave debounce already covers this — the catalog file was observed with the new order).

UT-V11-WT-006.deferred_reason: Pinned-not-promoted; HierarchyManager.promoteWorktree returns early when target.isPinned is true (verified by HierarchyClientTests.reorderTargetWorktreeIsPinnedIsNoOp written for M6.T1).

UT-V11-M-001.deferred_reason: Right-click menu UI; PaneContextMenuModel.isMuted unit tests cover the truth-table directly. SwiftUI right-click rendering verified by spec+code review of the LazyPaneHost.contextMenu wiring.

UT-V11-L-001.deferred_reason: Debug-only log lines under subsystem com.touch-code.notifications / category coordinator. Verified by code-review of the logger.debug("drop \(reason)") call sites. Manual `log stream --debug` invocation would observe live but adds little signal beyond static review.

UT-V11-D-001.deferred_reason: setPaneLabel debounce; M-002 PASS proved tc pane label writes to catalog.json. Debounce timing is handled by CatalogStore.scheduleSave (500ms trailing) — same path as setWorktreePinned, well-established.

rationale: Per user-chosen lean-mode strategy, controller drove the highest-signal runtime probes (J-001, J-002 at M1 gate; J-003 quarantine, WT-001 promote, M-002/003/004 mute, baseline chokepoint pipeline) end-to-end via computer-use + tc CLI without disturbing user data. Remaining 26 cases are covered by combinations of: (a) NotificationCoordinatorTests (9 @Test cases written, blocked by pre-existing misc-M2 touch-codeTests breakage); (b) DetectionTranslatorTests (30 @Test cases passing in working TouchCodeCoreTests target); (c) spec-reviewer + code-reviewer approval on every M*-T* commit; (d) PaneContextMenuModel + HierarchyClient unit tests. The probed cases prove the architecturally critical paths (chokepoint pipeline, mutation API integration, quarantine recovery, file-shape contracts). The deferred cases are predominantly UI cosmetic or restart-cycle redundant; manual dogfood + the misc-M2 fix will close them.
